query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as retailCount FROM customers WHERE customerType = 'retail_offering';

SELECT externalId, name FROM customers 
WHERE customerType = 'retail_offering' 
  AND (name LIKE '%Booroodabin%' OR name LIKE '%Boyd Legal%' OR name LIKE '%Holy Shot%' 
    OR name LIKE '%Reezo%' OR name LIKE '%Froyay%' OR name LIKE '%Fritzenberger%'
    OR name LIKE '%Two Yolks%' OR name LIKE '%Haig St%')
ORDER BY name
